tasks.title: Case Contracts and Command Validation
tasks.notes: Runtime command validation implemented in contracts + backend command processor + player command bus

tasks.title: Offline-First Minimum (Cache + Reconnect)
tasks.notes: Rescoped to practical minimum: cache playlist/media, offline playback continuity, retry/backoff

tasks.title: MQTT Layer and Commands
tasks.notes: Shared client pattern with explicit connect(), browser websocket fixes (ws://:9001, MQTT_CLIENT_* env vars)

tasks.title: Platform Adapter (Tizen-first, WebOS-ready)
tasks.notes: Implement Tizen behavior and fallback/mock for unsupported APIs

tasks.title: Player Engine and Command Execution
tasks.notes: Sequential playback, duration/video-end transitions, loop, required MQTT command handling with idempotency

tasks.title: Build and Test
tasks.notes: Lint and typecheck passing at workspace level

tasks.title: Case Documentation and Delivery
tasks.notes: README + emulator + MQTT protocol + trade-offs + known limitations

tasks.title: Architecture Alignment
tasks.notes: Alias imports, backend layout, env split, no-comments policy established

tasks.title: Backend Refactoring
tasks.notes: DB Go-style lazy init, MQTT shared client, pino logging, simplified registration/health, compose cleanup

tasks.title: Tizen WGT Build Automation
tasks.notes: player-tizen build now produces signed WGT via env-driven .env.tizen + package-wgt.sh + turbo outputs caching (*.wgt)

tasks.title: Final Demo Checklist and Submission Validation
tasks.notes: One-command demo flow and final acceptance verification before handoff

tasks.title: Backend OpenAPI Refactoring
tasks.notes: Refactored backend to baseapp-style patterns: controller/service/repository layering, modal.ts/doc.ts patterns, OpenAPI integration with Hono Zod OpenAPI, Swagger UI, pino HTTP logger. Post-completion fixes: OpenAPI /api grouping, route doc path normalization, registerHandler typing fix, MqttProtocol derived from validProtocols, standardized error handling
